scope.summary: Single file page.tsx redesign, no new deps, no shared component changes, all data preserved

architecture.summary: Pure presentational reorganization within existing page component, no backend or data model changes

integrations.summary: No integration changes. Existing shared components (SectionDivider, TerminalBlock, TierBadge, TrustBadge, RepoHealthBadge, RepoLink, ReportProblemModal, TaintWarning) remain untouched. Same data model consumed.

ui-ux.summary: Hero zone with h1+badges+byline, install command above fold, duplicate elimination (category/extensible/meta), compact inline stats replacing StatCard boxes, details/summary for badge embed and universal Works With section

performance.summary: No perf changes needed. File size reduction from 810 to under 700 lines. Removing StatCard component reduces DOM nodes. details/summary is native HTML progressive disclosure with zero JS cost.

security.summary: No security implications. Security scan display reorganized from vertical list to horizontal chips but same data rendered. No new user inputs, no API changes, no auth changes.

edge-cases.summary: Skills with no repo, no extensibility, no external scans, zero stats, no labels, universal vs specific agent compatibility all handled. BlockedSkillView branch untouched. Byline items conditionally rendered when data missing.
